faqs.question: Why are silverfish common in Glen Oaks homes?
faqs.answer: Glen Oaks' humid climate and older housing stock with basements and crawl spaces create ideal conditions for silverfish. These pests thrive in damp, dark areas commonly found in bathrooms, laundry rooms, and storage spaces throughout Glen Oaks properties. Our treatments address both the infestation and underlying moisture issues.
